description: Jesus heals blind Bartimaeus and meets Zacchaeus the tax collector before heading to Jerusalem.
Jesus stays with Mary, Martha, and Lazarus. He anointed for burial at Simon's house.
Jesus enters Jerusalem. Triumphal entry on a donkey. 'Hosanna to the Son of David!'
Jesus cleanses the temple, overturning money changers' tables. Teaches about his coming death.
Jesus prays in agony at the Garden of Gethsemane. 'Not my will, but yours be done.'
Jesus is arrested, tried before the Sanhedrin, and denied by Peter.
Jesus is tried before Pontius Pilate. Pilate washes his hands. Jesus is sentenced to crucifixion.
Jesus is crucified with two thieves. His side is pierced. He dies and is buried in Joseph's tomb.
Jesus rises from the dead on the third day. Appears to Mary Magdalene, disciples, and many witnesses.
